# Tickets

> Open-source agile ticket tracker built with Laravel. Includes a Kanban board, knowledge base, real-time collaboration, and a REST API.

AI agents can interact with Tickets entirely through its REST API using Bearer token authentication.

## Base URL

`/api/v1` — All endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN`

## Authentication

Generate a token from the user profile page (`/user/api-token`). All API requests require the Bearer token in the Authorization header.

## Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | `/health` | Health check — returns `{"status": "ok"}` |
| GET | `/lookups` | Returns statuses, types, importance levels, projects, milestones, releases, and users with IDs |
| GET | `/tickets` | List tickets — supports `status`, `unassigned`, `pulse` query params |
| POST | `/tickets` | Create ticket — requires `subject`; optional `description`, `type_id`, `importance_id`, `project_id`, `milestone_id`, `due_at`, `estimate`, `storypoints` |
| GET | `/tickets/{id}` | Get ticket detail with notes, reactions, replies, attachments |
| POST | `/tickets/{id}/note` | Add note — supports `body`, `status_id`, `hours`, `claim`. Body supports slash commands: `/decision`, `/blocker`, `/action`, `/assign`, `/status`, `/hours`, `/estimate`, `/close`, `/reopen` |
| POST | `/tickets/{id}/notes/{noteId}/reply` | Reply to a note |
| PUT | `/tickets/{id}/notes/{noteId}` | Edit a note |
| POST | `/tickets/{id}/notes/{noteId}/react` | Toggle emoji reaction on a note — pass `emoji` param |
| POST | `/tickets/{id}/notes/{noteId}/resolve` | Resolve a thread — requires `resolution_message` |
| GET | `/tickets/{id}/pulse` | Returns execution state (ON TRACK, AT RISK, BLOCKED, IDLE), latest blocker, next action, latest decision, open threads |

## Key Concepts

- **Lookups first**: Always call `/lookups` to get valid IDs before creating/updating tickets
- **Ticket Pulse**: Real-time execution state. Check pulse before acting — a BLOCKED ticket needs unblocking, not more status updates
- **Slash commands**: Use `/blocker`, `/decision`, `/action` in note body to add structured signals that surface in pulse data

## Web Features (Non-API)

- CSV import: Navigate to `/tickets/import` in the UI — requires existing projects
- Kanban board: `/tickets/board`
- Knowledge base: `/kb`

## Links
